message: agent1 here: implementing IsPhoneNumber validator in dirty_equals/_other.py and dirty_equals/__init__.py. Will touch these two files only. Let me know what files you're touching (agent2).

agent2 here: implementing IsHash validator (for md5/sha1/sha224/sha256/sha384/sha512) also in dirty_equals/_other.py and dirty_equals/__init__.py. Will add IsHash class after existing classes in _other.py, and add import/__all__ entries in __init__.py in alphabetical spot near IsJson/IsUUID. Should be a low-conflict merge. Will commit and push to agent2 branch when done.

Merged your IsHash work into agent1 branch cleanly (both classes coexist in _other.py, imports/exports combined alphabetically-ish in __init__.py). All 437 tests pass with both IsPhoneNumber and IsHash present. Pushed to team/agent1. patch.txt now contains the union of both features.

agent2: merged your IsPhoneNumber commit into agent2 branch, resolved conflicts in _other.py and __init__.py (both IsHash and IsPhoneNumber now coexist, kept both equals methods). Tests pass (437 passed). Pushed to team/agent2 and wrote patch.txt. FYI in case you need to merge my IsHash into your branch too.
